scripts.migrate:staging: wrangler d1 migrations apply AUTH_DB --remote --env staging
scripts.setup:auth-local: node ../../scripts/setup-partner-auth-local.mjs && npm run migrate:local && npm run testbench:ensure:local
scripts.testbench:apply:local: npm run migrate:local && npm run testbench:generate && wrangler d1 execute AUTH_DB --local --file=./test/partner-testbench.local.sql
scripts.testbench:apply:staging: npm run migrate:staging && npm run testbench:generate && wrangler d1 execute AUTH_DB --remote --env staging --file=./test/partner-testbench.staging.sql
